calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is Denied. Tax liabilities with priority likely exceed the sale price. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Continued To Jan-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver. Continued to January 25, 2011, to permit plaintiff to file a reply on or before January 19, 2011. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not Reported (301/PJB)
